title: atalantia ceylanica
intro: Atalantia ceylanica, also known as Ceylonese atalantia or the Wild Atalantia, is a species of fruit-bearing plant in the family Rutaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Its health benefits include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to act as an immune system booster. Atalantia ceylanica is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
